emails.subject_base:
Enron Corp./Enron Credit Inc. ("ECI") guaranty amendment
 (increase from USD25 Million to USD100 Million) in favor of Bear, Stearns,
 et al
emails.body: Re: Enron Corp./Enron Credit Inc. ("ECI") guaranty amendment (increase from USD25 Million to USD100 Million) in favor of Bear, Stearns, et al You may want to clarify this with Keegan as 1) your voice mail was full on that Friday, 2) Keegan tried to contact you in New York and the number she had for you was disconnected, and 3) we tried to locate the documents that Friday and were not able to. Cheryl Nelson Sent by: Cheryl Nelson 05/21/2001 11:00 AM

emails.subject_base:

 (increase from USD25 Million to USD100 Million) in favor of Bear, Stearns,
 et al
emails.body: Re: Enron Corp./Enron Credit Inc. ("ECI") guaranty amendment (increase from USD25 Million to USD100 Million) in favor of Bear, Stearns, et al Stephanie, you may want to clarify all of the facts as well. That a local phone number was disconnected is irrelevant because keegan called my cell phone number and spoke with my fiance. He and Keegan then called my house in New York and notified my family that Keegan wanted to reach me. They conveyed that message to me immediately as I walked though the door. I then immediately called Keegan the minute I walked into my house in New York. As I mentioned to Sara, if you need to reach me Cheryl Nelson Senior Counsel EB3816 (713) 345-4693 <URL> Stephanie Panus 05/21/2001 11:54 AM
